'''Boz''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Customs official/Legends|customs official]] on the [[Jubilee Wheel (space station)|Jubilee Wheel]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], using the alias of Roaky Laamu, and [[Roa]] went through a security station Boz referred to Solo's [[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|DL-44 heavy blaster pistol]] as an antique.<ref name="AoCI" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
